labs/unicorn-store/infrastructure/cdk/po.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin source and target to Java 21
labs/unicorn-store/infrastructure/cdk/po.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if source/target remain at 17

labs/unicorn-store/infrastructure/cdk/sr.general_idea: Replace direct instantiation of AwsSolutionsChecks with builder pattern to comply with AWS CDK library API changes.
labs/unicorn-store/infrastructure/cdk/sr.why_exists: The no-argument constructor for AwsSolutionsChecks was removed or deprecated in newer versions of the aws-cdk-lib, causing a compilation error.

labs/unicorn-store/infrastructure/cdk/sr.general_idea: Update the AWS Lambda runtime configuration to use Java 21 instead of Java 17 to align with the JDK migration.
labs/unicorn-store/infrastructure/cdk/sr.why_exists: Without this change, the Lambda function would attempt to run on Java 17, which is incompatible with the application code compiled for Java 21, leading to runtime errors or deployment failures.

labs/unicorn-store/infrastructure/db-set.general_idea: Configure the compiler to target Java 21 source and target levels.
labs/unicorn-store/infrastructure/db-set.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with Java 21 features if source/target remain at 17.

labs/unicorn-store/software/unicorn-stor.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
labs/unicorn-store/software/unicorn-stor.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with the target runtime if the source/target version is not updated to match the installed JDK 21.
